ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation – Order #123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:

spam.subject: Urgent: Scholarship Award Notification – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! Your application has been selected for the prestigious Global Scholars Fellowship at the University of Aurora. As a recipient, you will receive a full-ride scholarship covering tuition, living expenses, and a stipend of $30,000 per academic year.

To confirm your award and secure your place, please complete the following steps within 48 hours:
1. Verify your personal details by clicking the link below.
2. Pay the mandatory administrative fee of $250 via secure payment portal.
3. Submit a copy of your passport and recent transcript.

<URL>

Failure to act within the deadline may result in forfeiture of the scholarship offer. For any questions, contact the Scholarship Office at scholarship@aurora.edu.

Sincerely,

Dr. Elena Martinez
Director, Global Scholars Fellowship
University of Aurora
